英國英格蘭肯特可巴姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Brooke於1497年出生在英國肯特庫利時，他的父親Sir Thomas Brooke32歲，母親Dorothy Heydon32歲。他於1517年與Anne Braye在英國肯特可巴姆結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1523年登記服兵役。他於1550年被列為appointed privy counsellor。他去世於1558年9月29日在英國肯特可巴姆享年61歲，埋葬在英國肯特可巴姆。

英国英格兰肯特可巴姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Brooke于1497年出生在英国肯特庫利时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Brooke32岁，母亲Dorothy Heydon32岁。他于1517年与Anne Braye在英国肯特可巴姆结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1523年登记服兵役。他于1550年被列为appointed privy counsellor。他去世于1558年9月29日在英国肯特可巴姆享年61岁，埋葬在英国肯特可巴姆。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Brooke was born in 1497, in Cooling, Kent, England, his father, Sir Thomas Brooke, was 32 and his mother, Dorothy Heydon, was 32. He married Anne Braye in 1517, in Cobham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1523. In 1550, at the age of 53, his occupation is listed as appointed privy counsellor. He died on 29 September 1558, in Cobham, Kent, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Cobham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Brooke est né en 1497, à Cooling, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Brooke, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Heydon, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Anne Braye en 1517, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1523. En 1550, à l’âge de 53 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est appointed privy counsellor. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1558, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Brooke 1497 in Cooling, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Brooke 32 und seine Mutter Dorothy Heydon 32. Er hat 1517 in Cobham, Kent, England Anne Braye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1523 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1550, als er 53 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als appointed privy counsellor aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. September 1558 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Cobham, Kent, England und wurde in Cobham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Brooke è nato il nel 1497 nel Cooling, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Brooke, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Heydon, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Anne Braye nel 1517, nel Cobham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1523. Nel 1550, all'età di 53 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed privy counsellor. Morì il 29 settembre 1558, nel Cobham, Kent, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Cobham, Kent, England.

イギリスイギリスケントコブハム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Brookeが1497年にイギリスケントコオリングで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Brookeは32歳，母Dorothy Heydonは32歳であった。1517年にイギリスケントコブハムでAnne Brayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1523年に兵役登録をした。1550年，53歳の時，職業はappointed privy counsellorと記録されている。彼は1558年9月29日にイギリスケントコブハムで61歳で死去し，イギリスケントコブハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Brooke(이)가 1497년 영국 켄트 쿠링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Brooke(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Heydon(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1517년 영국 켄트 컵함에서 Anne Braye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1523년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1550년, 53세의 나이로 그의 직업은 appointed privy counsellor이었다. 그는 1558년 9월 29일 영국 켄트 컵함에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 컵함에 묻혔다.

Cobham, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Brooke nasceu em 1497, em Cooling, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Brooke, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Heydon, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Braye em 1517, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1523. Em 1550, com 53 anos, sua profissão aparece como appointed privy counsellor. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1558, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Brooke родился в 1497 г. в местности кулинг, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Brooke было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Heydon, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Braye в 1517 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1523 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1550 году, в возрасте 53 лет, работал по профессии appointed privy counsellor. Он умер 29 сентября 1558 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Brooke nació en 1497, en Cooling, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Brooke, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Dorothy Heydon, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Anne Braye en 1517, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1523. En 1550, a la edad de 53 años, su ocupación registrada era appointed privy counsellor. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1558, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.
